put.description: Update selected answer for a specific attempt answer

get.description: Get paginated list of attempts with optional filters

post.description: Creates a new attempt for the authenticated user and assigns random questions from the ticket, or completely random questions if no ticket is provided.

ticket_id.description: ID of the ticket to attempt. Leave empty for random exam mode.

questions_count.description: Number of questions to assign if ticket_id is null. Default is 20.

get.description: Get attempt with ticket, questions, answers and selected answers

post.description: Authenticates a user with login credentials

otp.description: Telegram bot orqali yuborilgan OTP kod

get.description: Returns a list of all available road lines with descriptions.

get.summary: Get all Sign Categories with Signs
get.description: Returns all sign categories including their underlying signs.

post.description: Validates Telegram WebApp user payload and returns a Sanctum access token.

get.description: Active tickets list with user's attempt count
Returns the latest active YHQ document with nested categories and items.

is_correct.description: Indicates if this is the correct answer

answer_id.description: ID of the selected answer, nullable if not answered yet

image_url.description: Optional image URL for the question

is_active.description: Indicates if the ticket is active
